instanceName.description: Optional instance name distinguishing the same step type across contexts.

isTerminal.description: Whether this step terminates the workflow.

runtime.description: Reserved federation placement (default `exarchos`); no behavior in 0.2.0.

lambda.description: Declares this step was a lambda whose body was dropped (LB-1). Always true.

description:
Delegate (lambda) step — built via `StepDefinition.CreateFromLambda` (LB-1).
The wire contract **never carries executable code**: the `Delegate` body is
dropped and its loss made visible by the `lambda: true` marker. There is no
field on this arm that can hold a delegate or executable.
